title: BOB Notification 2026 - Apply online for 30 Sports Person Posts
description: The Bank of Baroda (BOB) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 30 Sports Person Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified for any degree can use this opportunity and apply for the BOB Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online on or before the last date of application. If you are looking ...
